svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.1.1" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="zNN9CQGqe5y-vco9r6Mf"> <mxGraphModel dx="2906" dy="2591" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
!include https://raw.githubusercontent.com/plantuml-stdlib/C4-PlantUML/master/C4_Context.puml

Person(user, \"User\", \"Renter or Car Owner\")
System(system, \"Auto-Rentals Platform\", \"P2P Car Rental System\")

System_Ext(payment, \"Payment Gateway\", \"Handles payments\")
System_Ext(email, \"Email Service\", \"Sends notifications\")

Rel(user, system, \"Uses via web browser\")
Rel(system, payment, \"Processes payments\")
Rel(system, email, \"Sends notifications\")

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="t2jcBcn9UUbGyAwCIhjI-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="402.65" x="-1140" y="-1620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
!include https://raw.githubusercontent.com/plantuml-stdlib/C4-PlantUML/master/C4_Container.puml

Person(user, \"User\")

System_Boundary(system, \"Auto-Rentals\") {

 Container(frontend, \"Next.js Frontend\", \"React\", \"UI layer\")
 Container(api, \"Express API\", \"Node.js\", \"Backend services\")

 ContainerDb(db, \"MongoDB\", \"NoSQL DB\", \"Stores data\")
 Container(cache, \"Redis\", \"Cache\", \"Optional caching layer\")

}

System_Ext(payment, \"Payment Gateway\")
System_Ext(email, \"Email Service\")

Rel(user, frontend, \"Uses\")
Rel(frontend, api, \"API calls (REST)\")
Rel(api, db, \"Reads/Writes\")
Rel(api, cache, \"Caches data\")
Rel(api, payment, \"Payment requests\")
Rel(api, email, \"Send emails\")

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="595.55" width="573.27" x="-620" y="-1630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
package \"Booking Service\" {

 [Booking Controller]
 [Availability Checker]
 [Payment Handler]
 [Booking Repository]

 [Booking Controller] --> [Booking Service]
 [Booking Service] --> [Availability Checker]
 [Booking Service] --> [Payment Handler]
 [Booking Service] --> [Booking Repository]

}
@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-3"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="143.08" width="705.96" x="-720" y="-1006.08" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
package \"Auth Service\" {

 [Auth Controller]
 [JWT Handler]
 [User Repository]

 [Auth Controller] --> [Auth Service]
 [Auth Service] --> [JWT Handler]
 [Auth Service] --> [User Repository]

}
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-4"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="137" width="442.17" x="-1169" y="-1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-5" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="Text" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="-500" y="-1380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-6" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0));">Context Diagram</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="-1130" y="-1610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-7" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0));"><b>Container &nbsp;Diagram</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="-600" y="-1620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-8" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0));"><b>Component Diagram</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="-1030" y="-1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2JBkW9L2392L46-Lpvp-9" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0));"><b>Component Diagram</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="-500" y="-1003" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
